final:
module top_module(
    output reg X,
    input wire A,
    input wire B,
    input wire C,
    input wire D,
    input wire VPWR,
    input wire VGND,
    input wire VPB,
    input wire VNB
);wire and_result;
    
    // Simple four-input OR gate implementation
    assign and_result = A | B | C | D;

    always @ (and_result) begin
        X = and_result;
    end

endmodule
